purpose: Scorable rubric for a router dispatch decision. A dispatch passes only when every mandatory criterion is met; advisory criteria flag quality without blocking.

criteria.statement: Exactly one references/<topic>.md was Read; no sibling playbook loaded.
topic is one of the seven enum values, resolved from intent or via one clarifying question.
depth is quick or deep and propagated to the routed run.
criteria.fail_action: set depth to default quick and record it.

criteria.statement: Routing follows lifecycle intent, not literal 'session' keyword matching.
No .specify/context.json write outside the session-manager route.
Every routing claim carries one Alfa-core tag, one family, consistent spelling.
Single brand, no invented prices, no PII echoed into the dispatch record.
A Guardian decision is emitted; non-proceed names the failing gate and corrective step.
When candidates were close, the discriminator that excluded each rejected topic is recorded.
The handoff names a concrete first action for the routed playbook.
criteria.fail_action: advisory: make the next action concrete.

scoring.green_is_not_default: an unmet mandatory criterion blocks; an [OPEN] field forces needs-confirmation
